case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS PAGAN, LYDIA A. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $712.07 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A. CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A. CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A. CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A. $712.07 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $744.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $806.49 AS TO DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A. CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A. CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $19.77 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PAGAN, LYDIA A. CAPPICIANO, MARCOS A.
